description: Payment API authenticates all requests via Auth Service. Direct runtime dependency.
failure_impact: All transactions fail if Auth Service is down

description: Customer Portal uses Auth Service for user login and session management.
failure_impact: Users cannot log in or access accounts

description: Internal Dashboard uses Auth Service for employee SSO. Cached sessions reduce dependency.
failure_impact: New logins fail but existing sessions continue for 24h

description: Payment API reads/writes transaction data directly to PostgreSQL.
Auth Service stores user credentials, sessions, and OAuth tokens in PostgreSQL.
Customer Portal reads transaction history from Payment API. Read-only, cached.
failure_impact: Transaction history shows stale data (cache TTL: 5min)

description: Internal Dashboard runs read-only analytics queries against a read replica.
failure_impact: Analytics data unavailable, no business impact
